Locations Across Thrissur
Our Story

A Taste Thrissur
Comes Back For

Kanary Restaurant brings together the comforting flavours of South India with the bold spices of Arabian cuisine, hearty biryanis and popular Chinese favourites — all under one roof. Every dish is prepared fresh, with a focus on consistent taste and warm hospitality that keeps guests coming back.

From our MG Road location in the heart of Thrissur to Koorkenchery and Ayyanthole, Kanary has grown into a trusted name for families, friends and food lovers across the city — known for great taste, comfortable seating and friendly service.

0Locations
0★Avg. Rating
0Reviews
Why Kanary

What Makes Us Different

01

A Menu For Everyone

South Indian classics, Arabian specialities, biryanis and Chinese favourites — all on one menu, so there's something for every member of the family.

02

Fresh, Flavourful Cooking

Every dish is prepared fresh to order, with quality ingredients and recipes that bring out bold, satisfying flavours every time.

03

3 Convenient Locations

From MG Road to Koorkenchery and Ayyanthole, there's a Kanary near you — perfect for a quick meal or a relaxed family dinner.

04

Friendly, Attentive Service

Our staff are known for being polite, helpful and quick — making every visit comfortable from the moment you walk in.

05

Great Ambience

Comfortable seating, good interior design and a relaxed atmosphere make Kanary a great spot to unwind with family or friends.

06

Honest Value

Generous portions and fair prices mean you get great food without stretching your budget — every single visit.
